title: Tender Italian Oregano Chicken Lasagna
description: A classic Italian dish with a tender twist, featuring dried oregano and egg-free ingredients. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the tomato sauce, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, tomato sauce, and ricotta cheese (if using).
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, create a thin layer of tomato sauce.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the noodles.
Top with half of the shredded mozzarella cheese and half of the grated Parmesan cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, sauce, ricotta cheese mixture, mozzarella cheese, and Parmesan cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
